ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (male, female, other) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "info" TEXT /* Additional information about the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the athlete's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the sport */,
  "rules_and_regulations" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who won the medal */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the medal was won in */,
  "medal_type" TEXT /* Type of medal (gold, silver, bronze) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event where the medal was won */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medal record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medal record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., personal best, record time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the performance metric (e.g., seconds, meters) */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete enrolled in the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the athlete's enrollment in the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the athlete's enrollment in the program */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the athlete's progress in the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete whose record was changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the coach specializes in */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the athlete's participation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the athlete's participation (e.g., medal, ranking) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in weeks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
